item.title: More progress, more details, more dream home magic
item.description: More progress, more details, and more work shaping the dream home build. A closer look at the details, craftsmanship, and steady project progress. What stands out most to you?

media:content.media:title: More progress, more details, more dream home magic
media:content.media:description: More progress, more details, and more work shaping the dream home build. A closer look at the details, craftsmanship, and steady project progress. What stands out most to you?

item.title: How This Property Becomes a Business Venture
item.description: A look at how this property is being approached as a business venture, with attention to the building process, project progress, and practical site work. What makes a property work as a project?

media:content.media:title: How This Property Becomes a Business Venture
media:content.media:description: A look at how this property is being approached as a business venture, with attention to the building process, project progress, and practical site work. What makes a property work as a project?

item.title: Every detail counts as this dream home takes shape
item.description: From structural work to finishing touches, every step brings this custom dream home closer to completion with careful craftsmanship and attention to detail.

media:content.media:title: Every detail counts as this dream home takes shape
media:content.media:description: From structural work to finishing touches, every step brings this custom dream home closer to completion with careful craftsmanship and attention to detail.

item.title: Stucco Waterproofing for a Foundation
item.description: Proper waterproofing and stucco application help shield the home's foundation from moisture, creating a durable base built to withstand the elements.

media:content.media:title: Stucco Waterproofing for a Foundation
media:content.media:description: Proper waterproofing and stucco application help shield the home's foundation from moisture, creating a durable base built to withstand the elements.

item.title: Building a Modern Home with Waterproofing
item.description: See how waterproofing is integrated into a modern home build, helping protect the structure from moisture while improving long-term durability.

media:content.media:title: Building a Modern Home with Waterproofing
media:content.media:description: See how waterproofing is integrated into a modern home build, helping protect the structure from moisture while improving long-term durability.

item.title: How House Walls Are Made
item.description: Follow the process of building house walls, from framing and structural support to preparing them for insulation and exterior finishes.

media:content.media:title: How House Walls Are Made
media:content.media:description: Follow the process of building house walls, from framing and structural support to preparing them for insulation and exterior finishes.

item.title: Roof Sealing for a Kitchen Remodel
item.description: The kitchen remodel continues with proper roof sealing, helping protect the home from moisture while preparing the space for the next phase of construction.

media:content.media:title: Roof Sealing for a Kitchen Remodel
media:content.media:description: The kitchen remodel continues with proper roof sealing, helping protect the home from moisture while preparing the space for the next phase of construction.

item.title: Building A Dream Home
item.description: A look at the building process behind a dream home, with focus on construction progress, craftsmanship, tools, and hands-on work. What part of the build do you like to follow most?

item.title: Tips and Tricks: Porch Roof Edition
item.description: A practical look at porch roof tips and tricks from the job site, with a focus on building process, tools, and project progress. What details matter most when framing a porch roof?

item.title: Filling the Wall Sheathing | House Build Day 25
item.description: Wall sheathing is being filled in on House Build Day 25, showing steady progress on the build and the hands-on work that moves the project forward. What comes next on the job site?

item.title: Let's Try Something New: 100% Level Every Time
item.description: A practical look at keeping work level every time on the job site. This video focuses on the building process, tools, and careful craftsmanship behind the result. What would you use this method for?

item.title: 3 Useful Methods to Sharpen Building Tools
item.description: A practical look at three methods for sharpening building tools, with a focus on keeping tools ready for work and maintaining good cutting performance. Which method do you use most often?

item.description: A look at the foundation work for a new house build, focusing on the building process and the steps that help set the project up for the next phase. What comes after the foundation is in place?

item.description: Part 5 of the mountain home build focuses on concrete day and the work that goes into it. A practical look at the building process, tools, and site progress on this project. What comes next?
